title: Yamagas interview Annos not crazy
wikitext:
[]: Yamaga's interview: Anno's not crazy             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Dec 21, 2006 3:56 pm Some time ago I saw this: http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/evangelion/2006-September/003693.html I'm still wondering about the source. What's that "May 1998 issue of EVANGELION"? Does the interview continue? Is there transcript somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 21, 2006 6:44 pm The May 1998 issue of the Viz-published manga, back in the day.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Dec 21, 2006 8:10 pm Does anyone have it? Is that the whole interview or there's more?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Dec 21, 2006 8:43 pm Anno's not crazy

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Dec 21, 2006 9:01 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Anno's not crazy

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 22, 2006 10:58 am AchtungAffen wrote: Does anyone have it? Is that the whole interview or there's more?

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Jan 05, 2007 12:20 am Reichu wrote: AchtungAffen wrote: Does anyone have it? Is that the whole interview or there's more?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 05, 2007 8:07 pm Huh....I did not know that was an Animerica Interview! :shock: (Seriously, that was such a great mag. It cost MUCH less than Newtype USA , and had more personality as well as information than Newtype USA could ever hope to have. ;)) Anyway, thank you for posting that, it was quite interesting! By the way, Carl, do you have anything to do with VIZ or have you written any books on Eva? Your name sounds really familiar but I can't remember from where...

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Sat Jan 06, 2007 3:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Huh....I did not know that was an Animerica Interview! :shock: (Seriously, that was such a great mag. It cost MUCH less than Newtype USA , and had more personality as well as information than Newtype USA could ever hope to have. ;)) Anyway, thank you for posting that, it was quite interesting! By the way, Carl, do you have anything to do with VIZ or have you written any books on Eva? Your name sounds really familiar but I can't remember from where...

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sat Jan 06, 2007 5:02 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: MaggotMaster wrote: Anno's not crazy

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sat Jan 06, 2007 8:07 pm Many many thanks, Carl!

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Wed Jan 10, 2007 12:40 pm Anno is not grazy: If you are born as an artist you would never notice Anno is grazy but just sombody who found what ultimate art is, namely depression... That's why i call him a genius and the whole team who worked on Eva. What's grazy to be depressive. If this can higher the power of his anime, it's just even better. I would like that he could hear that i want to take the same path as he does, but no evangelion rippoff.... only isnane depression. ......... waaaaaahhahhhhhhhhhhhhhh!!! Btw thx for the interview mr Carl ^^. I would never have tought to see a post from an editor here ^^
